title: Fixed undefined symbols in IntervalsTrainer.jsx
summary: Added missing imports and inlined helper UI components copied from ScalesTrainer to resolve ESLint undefined errors.
details: Patched src/trainers/IntervalsTrainer.jsx: added imports (NOTE_NAMES, FLAT_NAMES, SCALES, SCALE_META, findNotePositions, noteNameToChroma) and copied TypewriterHint, InfoIcon, ScaleBlueprintBar helpers. Replaced hard-coded vocalization color with theme tokens.

title: Build compiled with ESLint warnings
summary: User ran `npm run build` — compilation succeeded but many ESLint warnings remain.
details: Warnings include unused vars, react-hooks/exhaustive-deps, no-template-curly-in-string in i18n.js, and duplicate key in PersonaView.jsx. Recommend addressing high-priority lint items next.
